content: A study in *Immunity* identifies aged CD8+ T cells in blood as a key driver of cognitive decline, independent of Alzheimer's pathology. title: AI Agents and the Fight for Customer Data
content: George Fraser, CEO of Fivetran, discusses AI's impact on data infrastructure with Martin Casado. Topics include Fivetran's merger with dbt, evolving data platform roles, and Fraser's view that AI's threat to enterprise software is overstated. They examine open data access, resistance to AI agents accessing core systems, and the continued need for centralized data foundations amid growing agent-based workflows. Fraser also addresses data gravity, coding agents, enterprise AI adoption, and how AI transforms software development and operations.

title: 为什么 AI 现在这么火，却很少有行业真的铺开呢？
content: AI adoption remains limited in traditional industries due to three factors: companies prefer incremental optimization over restructuring workflows; AI struggles with real-world applications like parsing unstructured documents (PDFs, Excel, contracts); and security concerns persist around AI's black-box nature, particularly in data-sensitive sectors.

title: Copilot 插件和 VSCode 更新后不显示 IntelliSense 解决方案
content: After updating VS Code, the Copilot plugin may suppress IntelliSense, leaving only Copilot suggestions. To fix this, add the configuration: `"editor.quickSuggestions": { "other": true, "comments": false, "strings": false }` in settings. This restores both IntelliSense and Copilot suggestions appearing together.

title: 高考，一场被包装成考试的国家保密工程 | 原文
content: China's national college entrance exam (Gaokao) operates as a classified state project involving multiple industries. Exam papers are printed in facilities with top-secret security clearance, including some prisons selected for their isolation. Staff remain sequestered for weeks under strict surveillance with confiscated electronics, shielded signals, and constant monitoring. Transportation usesarmed police convoys with GPS tracking and restricted radio silence. Grading employs isolated scanners with disabled network functions, monitored by security cameras and guards. The entire system prioritizes leak prevention over efficiency.

title: 找一个程序员搭子，互相鼓励
content: A solo developer seeks an accountability partner after leaving a job and renting an office. Productivity dropped without supervision, leading to avoiding important tasks through comfortable busywork. They want a peer also working independently to exchange daily three-task lists morning and completion reports evening—no deep discussion or project feedback needed. Their focus: game tools websites plus SEO, using Next.js, Claude Code, and AI automation.

Tech stocks are not truly dangerous when prices are obviously high and investors avoid buying. Real risk emerges when prices drop to seemingly attractive levels, triggering repeated attempts to "buy the dip" despite ongoing declines. Current valuations in sectors like non-ferrous metals remain above even planned exit prices, suggesting potential 50% further downside remains.

title: 汤道生对话姚顺雨：腾讯AI下半场
content:
Tencent executives Dowson Tong and Shunyao Yao discussed AI strategy at Beijing's National Convention Center. Yao, who coined the "second half of AI" concept, emphasized that while AI methodologies have matured, identifying valuable problems to solve has become harder. He joined Tencent for its rich problem set, contextual advantages, and culture of trust and low ego.

They highlighted Co-Design between models and products as essential—building mutual trust, creating realistic evaluations rather than benchmark-chasing, and leveraging data feedback loops across products like Yuanbao, CodeBuddy, and WorkBuddy. Yao noted that LLMs require diverse composite capabilities even for specialized tasks.

On agents, Yao reflected on his 2019 research predicting LLM-driven automation. Both agreed agent development demands understanding scenario-specific context, flat organizational structures, and iterative experimentation. They dismissed "Token anxiety," stressing performance over cost optimization.

Tong concluded that Tencent's multi-industry presence provides unique contextual data
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 腾讯公司

title: 微信AI对手机厂商打开一道窄门｜焦点分析
content: Tencent is partnering with Huawei, Xiaomi, Honor, OPPO, and vivo to enable voice-activated WeChat calls and messaging through an Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol. Unlike GUI agents that simulate screen taps—previously blocked by WeChat for security risks—this approach lets phone system agents communicate directly with WeChat's internal agent via encrypted protocols, requiring dual user and app authorization. Tencent President Martin Lau had criticized unlicensed OS-level agents as "plundering" apps. WeChat's AI agent, capable of accessing millions of mini-programs, is expected to launch soon after regulatory approval. This collaboration balances tensions between phone manufacturers and app providers in China's mobile ecosystem.

title: Do transformers need three projections? Systematic study of QKV variants
content: A systematic study investigates whether transformer attention mechanisms require three separate query, key, and value (QKV) projections. The research examines variants that reduce this number, analyzing their impact on model performance and efficiency. Results suggest that some simplified configurations can maintain comparable effectiveness to standard three-projection transformers, potentially offering computational benefits. The findings contribute to understanding which components of attention are essential versus redundant in transformer architectures.

title: 为什么库里没有选择安踏？
content: NBA star Stephen Curry signed a 10-year deal with Li-Ning for his independent Curry Brand after leaving Under Armour in 2025. Unlike rival Anta, which already has multiple NBA stars and competing golf interests, Li-Ning offered Curry greater autonomy and exclusive focus—aligned with his preference for non-mainstream partners. Li-Ning, needing a global basketball icon more than Anta does, accepted terms where it essentially manufactures for Curry's owned brand. The deal tests whether Li-Ning can grow Curry Brand without replicating Nike's unmatched Jordan model.

title: Gemma4 12B 如何跑在 16G 显存上？

title: 被世界品牌学习，山下有松的秘密是？
content: Chinese leather-goods brand Songmont has attracted significant overseas consumer interest, with foreign tourists queuing at its Shanghai flagship and professional daigou buyers emerging to resell products abroad—an unprecedented reversal of China's typical one-way luxury purchasing pattern. The brand's appeal stems from exceptional craftsmanship: complex hand-assembly exceeding domestic competitors threefold, proprietary hardware with 18 components, premium European full-grain leather, and jewelry-grade gold-plating processes. Its design language subtly incorporates Chinese cultural elements—Song dynasty ceramics, traditional mortise-and-tenon joints, temple roof silhouettes—into modern, functional forms. Without heavy overseas marketing, celebrity partnerships, or extensive international retail, Songmont has built 560,000 Instagram followers and 4.6/5 Trustpilot ratings through product quality alone. title: 突发！Anthropic呼吁全员停止AI研究
content: Anthropic reports that AI-driven recursive self-improvement (RSI) has begun. Internal data shows Claude now writes over 80% of Anthropic's code, up from single digits before Claude Code's launch. Engineer code output has octupled since 2024. Claude's success on open-ended programming tasks jumped from 26% to 76% in six months. The AI now reviews all code submissions, detects bugs elite engineers miss, and has surpassed human researchers in optimizing training code and AI safety experiments. Independent task duration capacity has doubled every four months, reaching 16+ hours. Anthropic proposes verifiable mechanisms to slow or pause AI research if competitors likewise commit, warning RSI could either dramatically advance society or cause alignment failures leading to loss of control. OpenAI issued a similar RSI warning days earlier.

content: Fenbi founder Zhang Xiaolong sparked outrage during a June 3 university lecture on career planning. After unprepared remarks on AI and stock trading failed to engage the audience, he erupted into a tirade, boasting about his wealth, insulting attendees as his "worst" audience, and storming out after swearing. Google researchers developed PHRM, a smartphone system that passively monitors heart rate and resting heart rate during daily use by analyzing brief facial video clips captured after face unlock events. Validated in Nature, the system uses deep learning to estimate heart rate with less than 10% error across all skin tones, meeting industry accuracy standards. In a free-living study with over 600 diverse participants, PHRM achieved wearable-comparable resting heart rate accuracy. The research aims to broaden cardiovascular health tracking access beyond wearables, particularly in low-resource settings.

title: 全球最火的富豪玩具，估值700亿，冲刺行业最大IPO
content: Finnish startup Oura has filed confidentially for a U.S. IPO at an $11 billion valuation, potentially becoming the largest smart ring IPO globally. Its Oura Ring, worn by celebrities and athletes like Cristiano Ronaldo, tracks sleep, heart rate, temperature, and stress without screens or notifications. The company has sold over 5.5 million rings with annual revenue exceeding $500 million. Oura's business model combines hardware sales with a $5.99 monthly subscription for AI-powered health insights, creating recurring revenue. The IPO tests whether AI health hardware can evolve from one-time purchases to sustained service businesses.

title: 菲尼克斯是数据中心重镇，亦是AI电力成本难题的试金石

As tech giants expand their operations in the region, the city is becoming a test case for resolving the costly challenge of powering AI infrastructure. The outcome could set a precedent for how such expenses are handled nationwide.

title: 苹果智能眼镜推迟至 2029 年，无显示屏 AI 眼镜仍将于 2027 年推出
content: Apple has canceled Vision Pro follow-up products and shifted focus to smart glasses, according to analyst Ming-Chi Kuo. Display-equipped AR/XR glasses are delayed to 2029, while display-free AI glasses remain scheduled for 2027. Incoming CEO John Ternus approved the strategy. The 2027 AI glasses will feature multiple frame designs, oval cameras, hands-free Siri, calls, music, navigation, and translation, priced at $200–$500. The move aims to compete with Meta's Ray-Ban smart glasses.

title: OpenAI 首席财务官谈公司 AI 设备：今年年底前将正式发布
content: OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar has tested the company's AI device and confirmed it will launch by year-end, though documents indicate shipping may not begin until February 2027 at the earliest.

title: Alphabet：预计 Gemini 3.5 Pro 将于 6 月推出
content: Alphabet expects to launch Gemini 3.5 Pro in June. The Gemini app surpassed 900 million monthly active users in May, more than doubling from 400 million in May 2025. The company reaffirmed its full-year capital expenditure outlook of $180-$190 billion, compared to market estimates of $186.6 billion.

title: 谷歌发布并开源 Gemma 4 12B 版多模态模型 可在 16GB 内存 / 显存上运行
content: Google released and open-sourced Gemma 4 12B, a multimodal AI model designed to run locally on consumer devices with 16GB RAM or VRAM. Despite its smaller 12B parameter size, it matches the intelligence of Gemma 26B. The model features a unified architecture that directly processes text, images, video, and audio without separate encoders, uses lightweight visual embedding, and handles raw audio signals. Licensed under Apache 2.0, it is available on Ollama, HuggingFace, and Kaggle.

title: GitLab 宣布重组裁员 14%: 全面重构 Git 基础设施以应对百倍 AI 工作负载
content: GitLab is restructuring, cutting 14% of staff (~350 employees) and exiting 22 countries to streamline management and redirect resources toward infrastructure upgrades. The company is rebuilding its Git architecture to handle 100x AI-driven workload growth, developing APIs optimized for AI agents, and investing in AI orchestration, context layers, and governance tools. Q1 revenue reached $264 million, up 23% year-over-year, with 88% gross margin. Restructuring costs are estimated at $30–35 million. The move signals a broader shift from human-scale to machine-scale software development.

title: 英伟达据悉收购初创公司 Kumo AI
content: 英伟达已收购成立四年的小型初创公司 Kumo AI，后者致力于开发基础模型以做出精准的商业预测，Kumo 的三位联合创始人 Vanja Josifovski、Hema Raghavan 和 Jure Leskovec 已于上月加入英伟达。

title: 摩根士丹利将向外部 AI 智能体开放其万亿美元规模资管业务接口
content: Morgan Stanley will open interfaces of its $1.2 trillion asset management business to external AI agents, allowing clients' autonomous AI to directly extract data from its equity management platforms ShareWorks and Equity Edge without traditional software interfaces. The firm has granted early access to select clients and plans to cover 3,400 custody clients by next year, making it one of Wall Street's first major banks to open its platform to external AI tools.

It features 376+ entries categorized by language and framework, one-click copying of rules and prompts, compatibility with multiple AI platforms beyond Cursor, and community submissions. The site is built with Next.js and should not be confused with a similarly named GitHub client for spoofing Cursor machine codes.

title: 大伙用 ai 有没有上下文焦虑
content: A developer working on a 400,000-line codebase experiences "context anxiety" with AI coding assistants. Initializing AI understanding consumes substantial context windows, and accumulating project familiarity through database tools and skills further depletes capacity. When context fills completely, starting fresh sessions resets the AI's expertise despite workarounds like documentation or compaction, creating a frustrating loss of accumulated project knowledge and forcing repetitive onboarding.

title: TrueNAS 用 intel 网卡跑满 2.5G 网络
content: TrueNAS 的网卡换成 intel i225-T1 后，速度终于跑满了。 之前用一块 TPlink 的 2.5G 卡，速度最高也就 150MB/s ，intel 的卡能到 260MB/s ，应该是 2.5G 网络的速度了。

title: GitHub Universe is back: All together now, in the agentic era
content: GitHub Universe 2026 is a two-day developer conference focused on practical AI agent integration into workflows. The event features keynotes, panels, lightning talks, small-group discussions, and an expanded open source showcase. New formats include Ship & Tell sessions, speaker after-parties, and a Discussions Lounge. The event emphasizes networking and hands-on learning. Super Early Bird registration is open until July 9, with 20% team discounts for four or more passes.
